CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
James Mark Miller, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D611)

Appearances:
Attorney James M. Millar of the Millar Lirm Firm (415-981-8100) appears as counsel for plaintiffs
Plaintiffs Blyth Butler and Rick Galvan are present.

Attorney Kevin K. Cholakian of Cholakian & Associates (650-871-9544 x201) appears as counsel for defendant.
Defendant's insurance representative, Sue Rokaw (252-876-7700) is available by telephone.

Judge Karnow, litigants and counsel confer jointly and separately in open Courtroom 611 regarding settlement. The case is settled. The parties sign a written agreement which is not filed. The trial is vacated. Plaintiff to file dismissal of entire action with prejudice within 10 days, and upon satisfaction of settlement terms.

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Millar, 415.981.8100 for Plaintiff/Moving Blyth Butler.
No other appearances.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jmaes Mark Millar, Esq. (415-981-8100) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Blyth Butler.
Brian Finn, Esq. (650-871-9544) for Defendant/Moving party MARK GIRAUDO, OPTIMAL PARTNERS.

Hearing is held. The Court admonishes Defendant re: meet and confer and announces the tentative ruling on the 2 motions. The Court's leaning is to overrule the Demurrer, 10 days to file an answer and deny request for judicial notice. The Court's leaning on motion to strike is to deny, damages are not improper. ARGUED. Defendant argues first cause of action, and SFRO 37.39. Plaintiff argues violation of Ellis Act. No Argument on motion to strike. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARK GIRAUDO, OPTIMAL PARTNERS's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to file answer, request for judicial notice is denied.Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jmaes Mark Millar, Esq. (415-981-8100) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Blyth Butler.
Brian Finn, Esq. (650-871-9544) for Defendant/Moving party MARK GIRAUDO, OPTIMAL PARTNERS.

Hearing is held. The Court admonishes Defendant re: meet and confer and announces the tentative ruling on the 2 motions. The Court's leaning is to overrule the Demurrer, 10 days to file an answer and deny request for judicial notice. The Court's leaning on motion to strike is to deny, damages are not improper. ARGUED. Defendant argues first cause of action, and SFRO 37.39. Plaintiff argues violation of Ellis Act. No Argument on motion to strike. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARK GIRAUDO, OPTIMAL PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP's Motion To Strike (Portions of Complaint (Punitive, Treble, exemplary and Actual Damages)) is DENIED. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Continued To Jan-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MARK GIRAUDO and OPTIMAL PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to January 20, 2017 for moving party to provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and operative complaint (SFLR 2.7B) to department 501 no later than December 23, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of opposition and reply. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Continued To Jan-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MARK GIRAUDO and OPTIMAL PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP's Motion To Strike is Continued to January 20, 2017 for moving party to provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and operative complaint (SFLR 2.7B) to department 501 no later than December 23, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of opposition and reply. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
